outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed volatility due to positive GEX. Expect range-bound price action.
outlook.summary: Spot is pressing against the massive 730 Call Wall Resonance. Positive Total GEX indicates dealers are long gamma, which suppresses volatility and favors price pinning. High Put/Call Ratios and bearish skews signal extreme pessimism, providing a contrarian bullish undercurrent. Expect strong resistance at 730 and structural support between 723 and 710.

levels.motivazione: Massive Call OI and volume across all expirations (0DTE: 139k+ Vol, Weekly: 8.1k OI, Monthly: 24.5k OI). Spot is immediately testing this structural ceiling.
levels.sintesiOperativa: MM DEFENSE: Heavy resistance zone active

levels.motivazione: Monthly Gamma Flip level. With positive total GEX, this pivot acts as an intraday equilibrium point just beneath the 730 Resistance.
Significant Put OI in 0DTE (31k) and MONTHLY (40k). Aligns with bearish skew sentiment, providing a robust structural floor.
Dominant Put OI in WEEKLY (82k) and MONTHLY (55k). Serves as the ultimate downside anchor for the current cycle.
0DTE Max Pain level and 0DTE Gamma Flip region (724.62). Positive GEX creates a magnetic attraction downward toward this point if 730 holds.
Major Monthly Call OI (19.5k). Secondary resistance level if the 730 Resonance is violently broken with high volume.
levels.sintesiOperativa: CALL WALL: Monthly upside cap limit
